title: 200pcs Curtain Hooks, White Plastic Hooks for Door Curtain, Window Curtain, Shower Curtains - Fits All Types of Curtains - 2.8x1.2cm
features: 【High Quality】Our curtain hooks white are made up of POM plastic, durable and sturdy, not easily bendable, corrosion-resistant & can withstand up to 1.2kg of load easily.
【Size】 Measuring at 2.8cm x 1.8cm, these curtain hooks are designed to fit most curtain types, including pencil pleat, window and shower curtains. Please confirm the size when you buy it.
【Easy to Install】The original spiral design takes just seconds to attach to your curtain thread, eaty to take on or off, it's also very safe to use with no pinpoint or sharp edges

【Wide Application】- Nothing is worse than oxidation coming from your shower curtain hooks, right? That's why we have come up with plastic hooks that will easily fit campervan windows, rod type curtains, blinds, pencil pleat, shower curtains,etc.
description: Design: Solid plastic curly hooks for attaching your curtain to the curtain pole rings, slightly jaggy shape help to keep them in place, holding your curtains up nicely. Size: 2.8 cm in height, 1.2 cm in width, durable and rustless; Package includes: 200 pack plastic curtain hook How to use: Just rotate the whole hook through the back of the threads on the curtain, then rotate it through the eyes of curtain ring, easy to install and remove.
